name: Angel Pie
recipeInstructions:
Meringue:
1. Beat egg whites until foamy.
2. Add Cream of Tartar and beat until the mixture forms stiff peaks.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Continue beating for an additional minute or two after all sugar is incorporated.
5. Butter and flour a 9-inch Pyrex pie plate.
6. Spread meringue evenly in the prepared dish.
7. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for 1 hour and 10-15 minutes.
8. Raise the temperature to 300°F (150°C) and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
Filling:
1. Beat egg yolks until smooth.
2. Gradually add granulated sugar, lemon juice, and grated rind.
3. Cook mixture in a double boiler over low heat until thickened.
4. Allow the filling to cool completely.
5. Whip whipping cream with powdered sugar until stiff peaks form.
6. Assemble pie by spreading half of the whipped cream on top of the meringue, then layering the lemon filling and placing the remaining whipped cream on top.
7. Refrigerate the assembled pie overnight.
